sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46473" key="zwogonhtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζωογον-ητικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n46473.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">capable of generation</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σύλληψις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:142" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.142</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
